native_queries.code:
SELECT
    t4.left_user_id::uuid "user_id",
    (t1 + t2.time_start::time without time zone)::timestamp "dtstart",
    (t1 + t2.time_end::time without time zone)::timestamp "dtend",
    COALESCE((not tsrange(t1 + t2.time_start::time without time zone, t1 + t2.time_end::time without time zone) && blocked_availability)::boolean, true) "is_available",
    t4.related_entity_id "clinic_id"
    
FROM generate_series(
    {{dtstart}}::timestamp,
    {{dtend}}::timestamp,
    '1 day'::interval
) t1
JOIN dctor.availability t2 ON extract(dow from t1) = t2.weekday
JOIN public.iam_user_relationship t4 ON t4.uuid = t2.owner_id AND t4.relationship_type = t2.owner_type
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
    SELECT
        t1.attendee_id,
		t2.clinic_id,
        range_agg(
            tsrange(
                dtstart::timestamp without time zone,
                dtend::timestamp without time zone
            )
        ) "blocked_availability"
        FROM dctor.event_attendee t1
        JOIN dctor.event t2 ON t1.event_id = t2."uuid"
	WHERE dtstart IS NOT NULL
        AND tsrange(
            t2.dtstart::timestamp without time zone,
            t2.dtend::timestamp without time zone
        ) && tsrange(
            {{dtstart}}::timestamp,
            {{dtend}}::timestamp + '1 day'::interval
        )
    GROUP BY t1.attendee_id, t2.clinic_id
) t3 ON t4.left_user_id = t3.attendee_id AND t3.clinic_id = t4.related_entity_id
WHERE t4.left_user_id = {{user_id}}::uuid
ORDER BY dtstart

SELECT t1.id, t1.enum_rating rating, COALESCE(t3.count, 0) "count"
  FROM (
  	SELECT t2.id, enum_rating
	  FROM generate_series(
		1,
		5,
		1
	  ) enum_rating, (
		SELECT *
		  FROM public.iam_user
		 WHERE "owner" = 'dctor'
		   AND "id" = {{user_id}}::uuid
	  ) t2
  ) t1
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (
	  SELECT t3.reviewer_id, t3.rating, COUNT(*) "count"
	    FROM dctor.review t3
	   WHERE t3.reviewer_id = {{user_id}}::uuid
	  	AND t3.reviewer_type IN ('admin', 'clinic_admin', 'doctor', 'patient')
	GROUP BY t3.reviewer_id, t3.rating
  ) t3 ON t3.reviewer_id = t1.id
	AND t3.rating = t1.enum_rating
